title: ceterach dalhousieae
intro: Ceterach dalhousieae, also known as the Himalayan rock fern or the Himalayan ceterach, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ceterach dalhousieae are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a powder or decoction for use in herbal preparations, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in the Himalayan region.
